location: On a corpse in a side room guarded by a Black Knight, reached by heading up the western stairs from the Main Gate Plaza Site of Grace in Shadow Keep.
region: Shadow Keep (Shadow of the Erdtree DLC)

source.name: Corpse guarded by a Black Knight, Shadow Keep

tactics: This is Shadow of the Erdtree DLC content, not base-game — you need the DLC installed and access to Shadow Keep to obtain it, despite being filed here as a base dagger.
From Main Gate Plaza, head up the western stairs; a soldier ambushes you partway up, then a side room holding a Black Knight and the corpse opens on the right.
The Black Knight here hits hard in melee — consider luring it into the open corridor to fight rather than engaging in the cramped room.
lore: A dagger built with an oversized hand guard, meant to be held in the off-hand alongside a thrusting sword or matching blade in the main hand — enabling a defensive parry-and-stab fighting style rather than serving as a primary weapon.

builds.name: Off-hand parry-and-poke
builds.why: C Dexterity scaling and an innate Parry skill make it a strong off-hand pick paired with a thrusting sword for a riposte-focused build.

builds.name: Powerstance thrusting-sword pairing
builds.why: Uniquely powerstances with thrusting swords rather than other daggers, letting it slot into a rapier/estoc dual-wield build.
